name: MongoDB to BigQuery Dataflow ETL
description: Syncs MongoDB collections to BigQuery. Normalises BSON to a native JSON column with a truncate-and-reload, and routes failed documents to a Pub/Sub dead-letter topic.

parameters.name: mongo_uri
parameters.label: MongoDB URI or Secret Manager path
parameters.helpText: MongoDB connection string, or a Secret Manager resource path of the form projects/PROJECT/secrets/NAME/versions/VERSION.

parameters.name: mongo_db
parameters.label: MongoDB database name
parameters.helpText: Name of the MongoDB database to read from.

parameters.name: collections
parameters.label: Collections to sync
parameters.helpText: Comma-separated list of collection names, e.g. users,orders,products.

parameters.name: bq_project
parameters.label: BigQuery project ID
parameters.helpText: GCP project that owns the BigQuery dataset.

parameters.name: bq_dataset
parameters.label: BigQuery dataset
parameters.helpText: BigQuery dataset the tables are written into (must already exist).

parameters.name: dlq_topic
parameters.label: Dead-letter Pub/Sub topic
parameters.helpText: Full Pub/Sub topic path for dead-letter messages, e.g. projects/PROJECT/topics/mongo-etl-dlq. Leave empty to only log failures.

parameters.name: table_suffix
parameters.label: Table name suffix
parameters.helpText: Optional suffix appended to every table name. Useful for test runs (e.g. _test).
